title: notifications-push — HTTP routes
description: Workspace per-user push subscription management. Provider webhooks handled by webhook module at POST /webhooks/inbound/notifications-push/{provider}.

groups.name: workspace-subscriptions
groups.description: Per-user push subscription CRUD. Users register their own devices; admins can view all subs but not the device_token itself.

routes.description: Regular users see their own subscriptions; workspace admins see all subs in workspace (device_token still hidden).
Register a push device token. Validates against provider (dry-run) before persisting. Body: {provider, platform, device_token, device_name?, app_version?, os_version?, locale?, timezone?}.
Revoke a subscription. User can revoke own; workspace admin can revoke any.

provider_webhooks.reason: Universal webhook module owns inbound receiver. This module ships FcmSignatureStrategy (Cloud Pub/Sub OIDC) + ApnsFeedbackStrategy + OneSignalSignatureStrategy at boot via NotificationsPushServiceProvider.
